segments.text: What happens when ransomware hits your server at 2 AM?
Most teams panic. Their backups haven't been tested.
Recovery takes hours. Sometimes it doesn't work at all.
I'm Muhammed. I built Rediacc to fix this.
Rediacc takes snapshots of your whole stack — databases, Docker services, configs.
When something breaks, you restore in minutes. Not hours.
Install on your server in five minutes. Link's right below.
